title: BNY Mellon: Great Time To Buy Before The Market Wakes Up
text: BNY Mellon has demonstrated steady results and is returning lots of cash to shareholders. The FTX debacle makes BNY's entry into digital asset custody services very timely.

title: 5 December Buffett Dividend Dog Buys, 3 To Await
text: This Buffett holdings list from Kiplinger first appeared 11/15/22 on line. YCharts and Dogs of The Dow both track this Buffett/Berkshire batch. Here is your update from the 12/23/22 YCharts data. 33 of 49 current Berkshire Hathaway-owned stocks pay dividends. As of 12/23/22, the top ten ranged 3.3%-5.76% by annual yield and 47 of 49 ranged -2.25% to 78.66% per broker-estimated target-price-upsides.

title: Worried About a Recession? Fee Income Could Be Your Port in the Storm
text: Does a rough economy mean it's time to play defense? Think fee income.

title: What To Expect From BNY Mellon Stock?
text: The custody banking giant outperformed the consensus estimates in the third quarter of 2022, with revenues increasing 6% y-o-y to $4.28 billion.

title: 7 Stocking Stuffer Stocks That Warren Buffett Loves
text: As we near the holiday season, investors looking for stocking stuffer stocks for their loved ones have come to the right place. In compiling such a list, the best place to start would be with the portfolio of one of the greatest investors of all time.
